text: Hi, we're reaching out about your business's eligibility for a lower merchant processing rate.
This is an important message regarding your Google business listing, press one to continue.
Congratulations! You've been selected for a complimentary marketing consultation.
We can get your company on the first page of search results guaranteed, interested?
I'm calling about extending the warranty on your company vehicle fleet.
Your business may qualify for up to fifty thousand dollars in working capital.
We noticed your business doesn't have a verified profile, I can fix that today.
This is a courtesy call about your current credit card processing terms.
Hi there, do you have a moment to talk about solar for your facility?
We're offering a special rate on commercial insurance for contractors like you.
Press one to speak with a representative about your SEO ranking.
I'd love to tell you about our lead generation service for home service businesses.
Hi, are you guys hiring? I'm a licensed plumber looking for work.
I saw you might need techs, do you have any openings?
I wanted to drop off my resume, who handles hiring there?
Do you take apprentices? I just finished my HVAC certification.
Are you looking for help? I've got fifteen years in the trade.
My son needs a job, do you hire helpers with no experience?
Is there a manager I can talk to about a job application?
I applied online last week, just checking if you're still hiring.
Do you offer any kind of paid training program for new techs?
Hey, what's the pay like for a service tech with you guys?
Is this Joe's Pizza? I want to place an order.
Hi, I'm trying to reach the orthodontist's office.
Did I call the towing company? My car broke down.
Is this the vet? My dog needs an appointment.
Sorry, I was trying to call my insurance agent.
Is this the courthouse? I have jury duty questions.
I'm looking for the pharmacy refill line.
Wrong number, I meant to dial the gas company.
Is this the hair salon? I need to book a cut.
Hello, is this the locksmith? I'm locked out of my car.
Hi, I'm with a uniform supply company, can I send you a catalog?
We supply wholesale fittings and want to set up an account with your shop.
This is about your business listing in our local directory.
I represent a fleet GPS tracking company, do you manage vehicles?
We do branded apparel and truck wraps, who handles your marketing?
Hi, calling from a payroll services provider, got a quick minute?
Can I speak to whoever buys your tools and equipment?
We offer discounted commercial fuel cards for service fleets.
I'd like to talk about advertising your business on our radio spots.
This is regarding your eligibility for a new business phone system.
Hi, we're conducting a brief survey about local service providers.
Do you have two minutes to answer questions about customer satisfaction?
This is a research call, we're not selling anything, just a few questions.
On a scale of one to ten, how likely are you to recommend us?
We're polling small businesses about economic conditions this quarter.
Would you participate in a short study about contractor software?
Press one if you'd like to take a brief automated survey.
We're gathering feedback for a university research project, interested?
Quick question for our market research: how many trucks do you run?
This call may be used for quality and research purposes, may we begin?
